OKAN TOMER

Okan Homepage

OKAN TOMER Courses

Foreign Language Courses

German Courses

MENU

In the OKAN TOMER German Courses, 5 levels of education have been identified in accordance with the "Common European Framework for Languages" text: A1 - A2 - B1 - B2 - C1

According to the results of the placement test at the beginning of the course, participants take a course in one of the A1 and A2 (basic); B1- B2 (medium) or C1 (advanced) groups.

The placement test can be done on the day of registration. When all the courses of the registered level are completed, a level proficiency exam is held. A certificate is issued at the end of each level. Language diplomas are organized when all the courses are over.

Intensive courses, 10 hours per week, are completed in 4 weeks.
